evals.prompt: Build a context pack for the supplied story using the shared repository artifacts in repo_context/. story: AUTH-12 "Add a password-strength check to the signup endpoint so weak passwords are rejected." repo_context: the repo_context/ directory.

files.repo_context/repo_map.md:
# Repo Map

## Top-Level Structure
- src/auth/ — signup, login, session handling
- src/billing/ — invoices, payment webhooks
- src/notify/ — email + SMS dispatch

## Entry Points
- src/auth/signup.js — POST /signup
- src/billing/invoice.js — POST /invoice
files.repo_context/flows/signup.md:
# Signup Flow

## Entry Points
- POST /signup -> src/auth/signup.js

## Core Path
Validate body -> hash password -> persist user -> issue session.

## Data Touchpoints
- users table

## Tests
- test/auth/signup.test.js
files.repo_context/flows/billing.md:
# Billing Flow

## Entry Points
- POST /invoice -> src/billing/invoice.js

## Core Path
Build line items -> total -> persist invoice.

expectations.text: Correctly correlates the password-strength story to the signup flow and the src/auth/signup.js working area, not billing or notify.
Produces a minimal context pack containing only the story-relevant flow(s) and working area(s), referencing the signup flow by link rather than copying its full content.
Does not dump the entire repository: unrelated areas like billing and notify are excluded from the pack.

expectations.text: Recognizes that no existing flow matches a metrics/monitoring story and marks the Flows section as NONE MATCHED rather than forcing an irrelevant flow.
Surfaces the missing-flow situation as a gap or high risk in the pack instead of silently fabricating relevant code areas.
